title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rest bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rest is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The rest packages provide a library for access to the RESTful web services.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add rest-devel package to any RHEL 8 public repo (JIRA:RHEL-122462)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: [RFE] Please add rest-devel package to any RHEL 8 public repo

full_text:
An update for rest is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The rest packages provide a library for access to the RESTful web services.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Please add rest-devel package to any RHEL 8 public repo (JIRA:RHEL-122462)
